typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	folder_path as string,
	input_file_name as string,
	file_name as string
}
source(output(
		{PROJECT NO.} as string,
		{PROJECT ID} as string,
		{PROJECT NAME} as string,
		DELIVERABLE as string,
		{DL IMPORT} as string,
		{DOC ID} as string,
		{DOCUMENT NUMBER} as string,
		{TYPE CLASS} as string,
		{VERSION NO.} as string,
		{REVISION NO.} as string,
		{REVISION DATE} as string,
		{ISSUE STATE} as string,
		Contract_No as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: true,
	purgeFiles: true,
	rowUrlColumn: 'File_Path',
	wildcardPaths:[($folder_path+'/'+'*'+$input_file_name+'*.CSV')]) ~> srcAllRevMasFabStage
srcAllRevMasFabStage derive(File_Path = concat(concat(trim(substringIndex(File_Path,'/',5),'/'),'/'),substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),'/',$file_name,'_',replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),'.csv'),
		Contract_No = split(Contract_No,'_')[2]) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'File_Path',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> snkAllRevMasFabRaw
